comments_made.note: Initial comment on C# readonly fields bug
Deep investigation: confirmed bug NOT fixed; FCS doesn't expose C# fields via FSharpFields or MembersFunctionsAndValues; proposed reflection-based workaround

Split BuildCommand.fs into DocContent.fs, Serve.fs, BuildCommand.fs

notes: Issue #362: C# readonly/public fields NOT fixed. FCS limitation confirmed - FSharpEntity.FSharpFields returns empty for C# classes; fields also absent from MembersFunctionsAndValues. Fix requires System.Reflection fallback in SymbolReader.fs. Issue #1022: PR for BuildCommand.fs split submitted. Remaining large files: SymbolReader.fs (1621), MarkdownParser.fs (1470), YaafFSharpScripting.fs (1123). Monthly activity issue not yet created for 2026-02.
